name: Resources
summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

properties.name: CannotRemovePackageAssemblyMessage
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Due to limitations in the .NET framework, it is not possible to update your package assembly while it is already loaded. Please update the assembly while Dynamo is not running and try again..

properties.name: CannotRemovePackageAssemblyTitle
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot update assembly.

properties.name: Culture
properties.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

properties.name: DownloadPackageDisabled
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Package download is disabled in no-network mode..

properties.name: InvalidPackageFolderWarning
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The folder '{0}' does not exist.

properties.name: InvalidPackageMalformedNodeLibraryDefinition
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to "A package called {0} found at {1} has improperly defined its node libraries in the package manifest. Ignoring it.".

properties.name: InvalidPackageNodeLibraryIsNotSigned
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to "A package called {0} found at {1} could not be verified to have signed dll files. {2} Ignoring it.".

properties.name: PackagesDirectorySkipped
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} was not scanned for packages because a preference setting disabled loading from that location.".

properties.name: ResourceManager
properties.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.
